example: I go to school by bus every day.
I take the bus to school every morning.
There was a terrible traffic jam this morning.
Public transport is cheaper than using a taxi.
Roads are very busy during rush hour.
I prefer to go to school on foot when the weather is nice.
Motorbikes are convenient and fast in the city.

vietnamese: đông đúc vào giờ cao điểm
example: Buses are pretty crowded at rush hours.
On the bus, I feel comfortable and can read books.

vietnamese: ít tai nạn hơn / an toàn hơn
example: Travelling by train is safer and has fewer accidents.
Motorbikes are the most common vehicle in Vietnam.

vietnamese: đi lại hàng ngày (đến trường/cơ quan)
example: My daily commute takes about thirty minutes.
Finding parking in the city centre is very difficult.
Always wear a helmet for your safety.
